name: components/progress
description: A linear indicator that displays the completion percentage of an ongoing operation. Built on Kobalte Progress with a customizable track and animated fill bar. Composed of Progress, ProgressGroup, ProgressLabel, and ProgressValueLabel primitives. Supports theming via the component-class system and is fully accessible with ARIA value-min/max/now attributes.
useCases: File upload or download indicators showing bytes transferred versus total size
Multi-step form wizards displaying how many steps have been completed
Background task dashboards (data imports, report generation, video encoding)
Quiz or survey completion meters motivating users to finish remaining questions
usage: import { Progress, ProgressGroup, ProgressLabel, ProgressValueLabel } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/progress"
